From voice memo to PDF
How It Works

Quote while you drive. Send before you park.

01

Record on site

Talk through the job while you are still on the tools. 30 seconds, done.

02

AI writes it

Line items, materials, labour, GST. All calculated automatically.

03

Send PDF

Professional quote hits their inbox before you leave the driveway.

04

Auto follow-up

Get reminded to follow up. Use one-click templates. Win jobs you'd normally forget.

Try It

Generate a quote in 30 seconds.

Tap the mic, describe the job, and let AI handle the rest.

Features

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Voice to Quote

Describe the job in plain English. No typing on a tiny screen.

Auto Follow-Up

Never lose a job because you forgot to follow up. Reminders + one-click messages.

GST Auto Calculated

10% GST added and itemised. ATO-ready formatting.

Professional PDF

Clean, branded quotes that look like you paid a designer.

Custom Branding

Your logo, colours, and terms. Every quote looks like your business.

Built in Adelaide

Made for SA landscapers. Local rates, local compliance, local support.

Testimonials

What Adelaide tradies say

“

Was spending every Sunday arvo doing quotes instead of with the kids. Now I write them in the van and the app reminds me to follow up. Won 3 jobs last week I would've forgotten.

DM

Dave M.

Landscaper, Golden Grove, SA

“

Sent a quote while I was still in the client's driveway. The follow-up message went out 2 days later. They signed that afternoon.

SK

Sarah K.

Landscaper, McLaren Vale, SA

“

Used to write quotes on the back of receipts. Now they look professional AND the follow-ups happen without me thinking about it.

MR

Mike R.

Pool Builder, Adelaide Hills, SA

Pricing

Simple pricing. No surprises.

Pro Monthly

$25.99AUD/month

Less than a coffee per day

  • Unlimited AI landscaping quotes
  • Auto follow-up reminders + templates
  • Voice memos to PDF in 30 seconds
  • SMS, WhatsApp, Email share
  • GST calculations
  • Quote win/loss tracking

7 days free trial. Then $25.99/month. Cancel anytime. No lock-in. Aussie dollars.
